morning_brief.preview:
---
# EverPass Morning Brief — Sunday, May 17, 2026

## Critical / Time-Sensitive

1. **SAMSUNG CTV** — T-3 DAYS TO LAUNCH (May 20) [UNSIGNED — CRITICAL]
   Separate Agreement still not executed; Standard Terms revenue/ad share exemption blocked. Today is Sunday — attempt contact with Annie O'Brien (a1.obrien@samsung.com) and Chi Tung now; if unreachable, escalate via Samsung AE and flag Kaplan. No signature by Monday AM = uncontained launch risk.
   **Deadline: May 20. 3 days remain. Weekend escalation required today.**

2. **NESN** — DEADLINE PASSED +4 DAYS [STATUS UNKNOWN]
   Clean term sheet v7 deadline (Bob Plaehn / Goldwyn Harper) passed May 13. MG structure ($300K combined Yrs 1–2 / $350K/yr from Yr 3) and Gate 3 clearance unresolved. No confirmed inbound.
   **Action: Draft follow-up to Plaehn/Harper for Monday AM send. Do not enter a second full week of silence. Deadline: Passed.**

3. **CHARTER** — EXHIBITS OVERDUE; F&B TIERS UNCONFIRMED; LANGE STATUS UNKNOWN
   Exhibit A overdue +32 days; Exhibit B overdue +16 days. F&B pricing tiers (Chili's co-sell, FCO sub-350 thresholds) were due Friday EOD — delivery still unconfirmed. Lange trigger flagged May 12 with no confirmed outcome. Alyssa Wade amendment and Nick Clessuras pricing flag remain open. Note: NFL Sunday Ticket Marketing Kickoff w/Charter is on calendar tomorrow (12:30 PM).
   **Action: Confirm Friday tier delivery and Lange trigger status in cockpit before tomorrow's Charter meetings. Prepare Monday AM escalation if unresolved. Deadline: Passed/Overdue.**

4. **DIRECTV** — SYMPHONYAI AUDIT DEMAND LAPSED +16 DAYS [OVERDUE]
   May 1 SymphonyAI file access deadline passed. Net underpayment claim $2,634,239.50; $65M second payment outstanding; litigation complaint near-ready. Brianna Santolli (Kelley Drye) drafting follow-up demand letter.
   **Action: Confirm Priesand return date with Santolli. Target demand letter send early this week. Deadline: Passed.**

5. **CHSN** — SECTION 5(e) LAPSED ~49 DAYS [TOP CONTRACT RISK]
   Section 5(e) lapsed approximately March 29, 2026. No cure path confirmed. Status unknown — check cockpit.
   **Action: Determine cure path or escalate to counsel before Monday. Deadline: Passed — escalate now.**

6. **NBA** — COUNTER PROPOSAL + ACCOUNTING NOT YET LOGGED [TIME-SENSITIVE]
   NBA counter proposal and accounting received May 15 — not yet entered into deal tracker or cockpit. Internal Charter & NBA discussion is on calendar tomorrow (3:00 PM).
   **Action: Log NBA counter proposal and accounting data in cockpit today before tomorrow's internal review call.**

7. **NBCU** — ENO WINDOW OPEN [59 DAYS REMAINING]
   Exclusive Negotiating Obligation window closes July 15, 2026. NBA on Peacock not in current grant. Phase 2b in progress.
   **Action: Confirm NBA on Peacock inclusion strategy this week before window tightens further. Deadline: July 15, 2026.**

---

## Active Deal Status

Partner              | Status                          | Next Action                                                    | Deadline
---------------------|---------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------
Samsung CTV          | UNSIGNED — CRITICAL             | Execute Separate Agreement; escalate to Kaplan if no response  | May 20, 2026 (T-3)

deals.next_action: (Active, Distribution): Counter expected 5/6-5/9 (Holden 5/5 ETA). NBA scope reply drafted, awaiting Ryan's send. Amended agreement deadline 6/15/2026. Spectrum TV Control Pro delayed 7/13. Fire Stick joint sales alignment needed before 5/21 STVA launch.
(Exploratory): Catch up rescheduled 5/5 to 5/7 10:30 (Gardiner). CONFLICT with Mediacom Discussion same slot 5/7 10:30. Project Gladiator boxing/FIFA+ scoping. Pre-commercial.
(Live): Bi-weekly integration 5/6 11:00 AM (Hegeman + cross-team). F1 Miami GP delivered 5/3. Watch IMAX expansion risk to MLS Season Pass and MLB Friday Night Baseball.
(Active, FAST): McCormack offering Fri 5/8 9:00-10:30 PT or 12:30-1:30 PT. Reply today. Executable draft 11 days overdue. Two-track deal: Weather API + 24/7 FAST channel; targeting late-May launch.
(Active, RSN): Plaehn 2nd chase 5/5 17:08Z. Respond within today or tomorrow. Term sheet v7 in NESN court since 4/12.
(Near Close, RSN): DocuSign 4/29 (Bernheimer); 5/1 follow-up. Ryan owes signature. July 2026 launch.
(Closed): NWSL amendment fully executed 2026-05-02 via DocuSign. Monitoring only.
(Legal Route Only): Legal + PR posture only per 5/5 directive. No commercial response. Rack rates NOT to be quoted.
(Active, Content): Altman 5/5 outbound on schedule. McIntosh Track A/B direction still overdue. EVO pricing gap and DAI impression share blank still open.

(Active, Content): Upfront 5/11 streaming. NBA confirmed NOT in commercial grant per 5/5 verification. Side letter or amendment required for any NBA commercial offering. CRITICAL mortality risk; term expires 2027-07-31 (~15 mo).
(Near Close, CTV): CTV launch 5/20 (14 days). Separate Agreement drafted, NOT executed. Without signature Samsung standard terms apply. Legal close needed this week.
(Active, RSN): Feneque 4/29 inbound on Exhibit B device multiplier discussion (3 fix options). Catch up next week.

Per-Event Fee Is $1,800 Up to 1,500 Concurrent Endpoints; Annual Service Fee Is $30,000 — Fixed fees: one-time activation fee of $20,000; annual service fee of $30,000; variable fees: $1,800 per live event (up to 1,500 concurrent delivery endpoints per event)…

Day-1 Dish Partnership Exploration Held — Charter-Parallel Model Receptive — First substantive packaging conversation between EP and Dish Business. Attendees: Andy, Kate (Dish); Ryan Blood, Alex Kaplan (EP). Sling Orange commercialization path closed by Dish…

Rate card is flagged as still under review — Schedule 1 carries a note that per-subscriber fees are "subject to Schedule 1 Section under the term sheet [Rate Card Under Review/Parties to Discuss]" and final rates are to be confirmed at execution; the current…

No Deal in Place; FOX Is the Only Major Broadcast Sports Provider Without an EverPass Agreement — FOX verbally committed EverPass as preferred commercial launch partner for Fox One DTC in July 2025; discussions stalled in November 2025 with no formal response…

Economics Gap: Zero-Fee vs. Paid-Per-Sub — EverPass proposes zero license fee with ad pass-through as consideration; Scripps Term Sheet requires paid per-sub fees at a rate card not yet provided. Neither side has moved and no counterpart economic draft exists.
